verses.latin_vulgate: Tituli inscriptio, ipsi David.   Conserva me, Domine, quoniam speravi in te.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִכְתָּ֥ם לְדָוִ֑ד שׇֽׁמְרֵ֥נִי אֵ֝֗ל כִּֽי־חָסִ֥יתִי בָֽךְ׃
verses.douay_rheims: The inscription of a title to David himself. Preserve me, O Lord, for I have put my trust in thee.
verses.finnish_biblia: Davidin kultainen kappale. Kätke minua Jumala; sillä minä uskallan sinuun.
verses.king_james: Preserve me, O God: for in thee do I put my trust.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dixi Domino : Deus meus es tu,  quoniam bonorum meorum non eges.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אָמַ֣רְתְּ לַֽ֭יהֹוָה אֲדֹנָ֣י אָ֑תָּה ט֝וֹבָתִ֗י בַּל־עָלֶֽיךָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: I have said to the Lord, thou art my God, for thou hast no need of my goods.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sinä olet Herralle sanonut: sinä olet minun Herrani: minun hyvätyöni ei ole sinun tähtes,
verses.king_james: O my soul, thou hast said unto the Lord, Thou art my Lord: my goodness extendeth not to thee;

verses.latin_vulgate: Sanctis qui sunt in terra ejus,  mirificavit omnes voluntates meas in eis.
verses.douay_rheims: To the saints, who are in his land, he hath made wonderful all my desires in them.
verses.finnish_biblia: Vaan pyhäin tähden, jotka maan päällä ovat, ja kunniallisten tähden, joissa kaikki minun mielisuosioni on.
verses.king_james: But to the saints that are in the earth, and to the excellent, in whom is all my delight.

verses.latin_vulgate: Multiplicatæ sunt infirmitates eorum :  postea acceleraverunt.  Non congregabo conventicula eorum de sanguinibus,  nec memor ero nominum eorum per labia mea.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יִרְבּ֥וּ עַצְּבוֹתָם֮ אַחֵ֢ר מָ֫הָ֥רוּ בַּל־אַסִּ֣יךְ נִסְכֵּיהֶ֣ם מִדָּ֑ם וּֽבַל־אֶשָּׂ֥א אֶת־שְׁ֝מוֹתָ֗ם עַל־שְׂפָתָֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: Their infirmities were multiplied: afterwards they made haste. I will not gather together their meetings for bloodofferings: nor will I be mindful of their names by my lips.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta jotka toisen jälkeen rientävät, niillä pitää suuri sydämen kipu oleman: en minä uhraa heidän juomauhriansa verestä, enkä mainitse heidän nimiänsä suussani.
verses.king_james: Their sorrows shall be multiplied that hasten after another god: their drink offerings of blood will I not offer, nor take up their names into my lips.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dominus pars hæreditatis meæ, et calicis mei :  tu es qui restitues hæreditatem meam mihi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְֽהֹוָ֗ה מְנָת־חֶלְקִ֥י וְכוֹסִ֑י אַ֝תָּ֗ה תּוֹמִ֥יךְ גּוֹרָלִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: The Lord is the portion of my inheritance and of my cup: it is thou that wilt restore my inheritance to me.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta Herra on minun tavarani ja osani: sinä tähteelle panet minun perimiseni.
verses.king_james: The Lord is the portion of mine inheritance and of my cup: thou maintainest my lot.

verses.latin_vulgate: Funes ceciderunt mihi in præclaris ;  etenim hæreditas mea præclara est mihi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: חֲבָלִ֣ים נָֽפְלוּ־לִ֭י בַּנְּעִמִ֑ים אַף־נַ֝חֲלָ֗ת שָֽׁפְרָ֥ה עָלָֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: The lines are fallen unto me in goodly places: for my inheritance is goodly to me.
verses.finnish_biblia: Arpa lankesi minulle kauniimmissa: minä olen jalon perimisen saanut.
verses.king_james: The lines are fallen unto me in pleasant places; yea, I have a goodly heritage.

verses.latin_vulgate: Benedicam Dominum qui tribuit mihi intellectum ;  insuper et usque ad noctem increpuerunt me renes mei.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֲבָרֵ֗ךְ אֶת־יְ֭הֹוָה אֲשֶׁ֣ר יְעָצָ֑נִי אַף־לֵ֝יל֗וֹת יִסְּר֥וּנִי כִלְיוֹתָֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: I will bless the Lord, who hath given me understanding: moreover, my reins also have corrected me even till night.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minä kiitän Herraa, joka minua on neuvonut: niin myös minun munaskuuni ovat yöllä kurittaneet.
verses.king_james: I will bless the Lord, who hath given me counsel: my reins also instruct me in the night seasons.

verses.latin_vulgate: Providebam Dominum in conspectu meo semper :  quoniam a dextris est mihi, ne commovear.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שִׁוִּ֬יתִי יְהֹוָ֣ה לְנֶגְדִּ֣י תָמִ֑יד כִּ֥י מִֽ֝ימִינִ֗י בַּל־אֶמּֽוֹט׃
verses.douay_rheims: I set the Lord always in my sight: for he is at my right hand, that I be not moved.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minä pidän aina Herran kasvoini edessä, sillä hän on minun oikialla puolellani, sentähden en minä horju.
verses.king_james: I have set the Lord always before me: because he is at my right hand, I shall not be moved.

verses.latin_vulgate: Propter hoc lætatum est cor meum, et exsultavit lingua mea ;  insuper et caro mea requiescet in spe.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לָכֵ֤ן ׀ שָׂמַ֣ח לִ֭בִּי וַיָּ֣גֶל כְּבוֹדִ֑י אַף־בְּ֝שָׂרִ֗י יִשְׁכֹּ֥ן לָבֶֽטַח׃
verses.douay_rheims: Therefore my heart hath been glad, and my tongue hath rejoiced: moreover, my flesh also shall rest in hope.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sentähden minun sydämeni reimuitsee ja minun kunniani on iloinen, ja minun lihani lepää toivossa.
verses.king_james: Therefore my heart is glad, and my glory rejoiceth: my flesh also shall rest in hope.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quoniam non derelinques animam meam in inferno,  nec dabis sanctum tuum videre corruptionem.  Notas mihi fecisti vias vitæ ;  adimplebis me lætitia cum vultu tuo :  delectationes in dextera tua usque in finem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֤י ׀ לֹא־תַעֲזֹ֣ב נַפְשִׁ֣י לִשְׁא֑וֹל לֹֽא־תִתֵּ֥ן חֲ֝סִידְךָ֗ לִרְא֥וֹת שָֽׁחַת׃
verses.douay_rheims: Because thou wilt not leave my soul in hell; nor wilt thou give thy holy one to see corruption.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä et sinä hyljää sieluani helvetissä, etkä salli sinun pyhäs näkevän turmelusta.
verses.king_james: For thou wilt not leave my soul in hell; neither wilt thou suffer thine Holy One to see corruption.

verses.hebrew_masoretic: תּֽוֹדִיעֵנִי֮ אֹ֤רַח חַ֫יִּ֥ים שֹׂ֣בַע שְׂ֭מָחוֹת אֶת־פָּנֶ֑יךָ נְעִמ֖וֹת בִּימִינְךָ֣ נֶֽצַח׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: Thou hast made known to me the ways of life, thou shalt fill me with joy with thy countenance: at thy right hand are delights even to the end.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sinä osoitat minulle elämän tien, sinun kasvois edessä on täydellinen ilo, ja riemullinen meno oikialla kädelläs ijankaikkisesti.
verses.king_james: Thou wilt shew me the path of life: in thy presence is fulness of joy; at thy right hand there are pleasures for evermore.
